data.title: 国际服活动「After-School Sweets Story: Sweet Secrets and Shootouts」常驻化
data.summary: [Immortalized Event Notice] The Event Story 'After-School Sweets Story: Sweet Secrets and Shootouts'
data.body:
[Immortalized Event Notice]

The Event Story 'After-School Sweets Story: Sweet Secrets and Shootouts' has been immortalized today, so you can play it anytime!

Log in now to check it out, Sensei!
